goal: Add a bounded state graph harness-version report that isolates reachable active and base harness versions, linked patches, evals, suites, statuses, runs, and relation provenance from projected version edges.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Harness version nodes exist in the graph, but operators cannot summarize which active or base harness versions were involved in a patch, eval, failure, or commit without manually inspecting raw relations.
